top_signals.title: India Seen Making Slow Return to Mideast Oil as Hormuz Reopens
top_signals.summary: India’s state-run refiners have already secured enough crude for the next two months and are in no rush to resume purchases from the Middle East even if the Strait of Hormuz reopens to commercial traffic.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Indian Software Stocks Tumble After Accenture Warns on Growth
top_signals.summary: Shares of Indian software firms tumbled on Friday, joining a global selloff in tech stocks after Accenture Plc forecast slower revenue growth, deepening concerns over a sector that has shed nearly 30% of its market value this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Vance says U.S. isn’t giving Iran ‘a cent’ as he defends Trump peace deal
top_signals.summary: "The only way the Iranians get any of these resources ... is if they comply fully" with the terms of the deal, Vice President JD Vance said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US crypto ETFs are pulling Bitcoiners into TradFi: BlackRock's Jay Jacobs
top_signals.summary: The merger of crypto, decentralized finance and traditional finance is being referred to as the “Great Convergence” at BlackRock.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: USB worm spreads crypto-stealing malware via Windows shortcut files
top_signals.summary: Threat actors targeting cryptocurrency wallets have been distributing clipboard-stealing malware with self-spreading capabilities and using the Tor network to conceal communication. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Currency Traders Pile Into Dollar Call Options After Hawkish Fed - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Currency Traders Pile Into Dollar Call Options After Hawkish Fed  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: A solid start - first progress report on the 'One Europe, one Market' Roadmap
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 18 Jun 2026 Following the signature of the Joint Declaration on the EU legislative priorities for 2026 and of the One Europe, One Market Roadmap, the European Parliament, the Council and the Commission have worked closely together to effectively deliver on the identified priorities.

top_signals.summary: How Uzbekistan could liberalise its economy with a push into green energy  Financial Times
